text.title: Spatial Accessibility Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping platform + input model to required modality coverage, comfort policy, and tester mix. Every leaf references a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: primary modalities = gaze+pinch + voice; controllers are unsupported; flat-window fallback via Mac companion
add controller + voice alternatives; never assume hand-track-only
controllers primary; add hand-tracking alternative + companion-app fallback
enterprise context — seated parity mandatory; gloves common, hand-tracking unreliable → voice + clicker primary
2D web fallback for non-headset users is mandatory
locomotion must include vignette + teleport; turning snap + smooth; ship FoV-reduce toggle
compliance claim forbidden; downgrade to partial; recruit missing categories

text.example: platform=visionos → modalities=[gaze+pinch, voice, single-hand] → comfort N/A (no locomotion) → captions head-locked → tester_mix(2,1,1) → compliance OK.
